products.name: Dell PowerEdge R760 Server
products.description: High-performance 2U rack server with Intel Xeon processors, ideal for enterprise workloads, virtualization, and data-intensive applications.

products.name: Cisco Catalyst 9300 Core Switch
products.description: Enterprise-class stackable core switch with advanced security, SD-Access support, and high-density multigigabit capabilities.

products.name: Cisco Catalyst 9200 Access Switch
products.description: Entry-level enterprise access switch with PoE+, Cisco DNA, and simplified network management.

products.name: VMware vSphere Enterprise Plus License
products.description: Industry-leading virtualization platform with DRS, HA, vMotion, and advanced resource management per host.

products.name: 1-Year Premium Support Package
products.description: 24/7 priority technical support, proactive monitoring, quarterly health checks, and 4-hour response SLA for critical issues.

products.name: Data Migration Service
products.description: Comprehensive data migration from legacy systems including planning, execution, validation, and rollback procedures.

products.name: Installation & Configuration Service
products.description: Full on-site installation and configuration of all hardware and software components including testing and documentation.

products.name: 2-Day On-site Training
products.description: Comprehensive 2-day on-site training program for IT staff covering operations, administration, and troubleshooting.
